name: KASHER Capital, Inc.
description_short: KASHER Capital, Inc. is a credit repair provider based in Atlanta, Georgia. Rated 5.0/5 with 54 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
KASHER Capital, Inc. is a credit repair provider serving clients in Atlanta, Georgia. Carrying a 5.0/5.0 Google rating from 54 reviews, KASHER Capital, Inc. has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the Atlanta area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

KASHER Capital, Inc. specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Atlanta, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. KASHER Capital, Inc. operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Atlanta, Georgia area who are considering KASHER Capital, Inc. should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
